overall.description: A futuristic spacecraft flies through deep space above a curved planetary surface, viewed from a stabilized third-person chase camera. The scene features a dark starfield with nebula clouds, illuminated by the ship's blue thrusters and red wing lights, creating a cinematic sci-fi atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic spacecraft forward through space with blue thrusters firing steadily and red wing lights pulsing

entered.detail: curved planetary horizon with atmospheric haze glow visible below the spacecraft
purple and blue nebula gas clouds drifting in the starfield background
dense field of stars scattered across the dark space background

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft maintains a steady course through open space, flying above the curved horizon of a planet. Blue thruster beams project from the rear of the ship, illuminating the surrounding void, while nebula clouds drift slowly in the distant starfield. The camera follows smoothly from behind, capturing the serene motion of space flight with no other objects or agents present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the silent void of deep space as a spacecraft glides above a planetary horizon. It begins with the ship maintaining a steady course, its blue thruster beams cutting through the darkness to illuminate the surrounding vacuum. As the vessel advances, the camera tracks smoothly from behind, capturing the serene motion of flight against a backdrop of drifting nebula clouds. The scene then expands to reveal the vast, curved edge of the planet below, blending the ship's artificial glow with the distant, shimmering starfield.
